transcription.text: I missed something. Part three, let's call it, is installing this bash guard here, this big thing that goes underneath the motor.
Have it up on the hoist when you do that. There's another process document for that that I'll link.
Same with this crossbar that replaces the old gearbox mount.
It's just bolted in and it's got two M8 fasteners, one here and one here, on both sides.
I think they're M8 by 25mm and they just go through and attach into the rivnuts that are on the mount.
Let's see if I can get it to...
There are the two M8 fasteners, the M8 rivnuts.
